query: SELECT dr.alunoId, a.name as alunoNome, dr.scoreD, dr.scoreI, dr.scoreS, dr.scoreC, dr.perfilPredominante, dr.perfilSecundario, dr.metodoCalculo, dr.completedAt FROM disc_resultados dr LEFT JOIN alunos a ON dr.alunoId = a.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT dr.alunoId, a.name as alunoNome, dr.scoreD, dr.scoreI, dr.scoreS, dr.scoreC, dr.perfilPredominante, dr.perfilSecundario, dr.metodoCalculo, dr.completedAt FROM disc_resultados dr LEFT JOIN alunos a ON dr.alunoId = a.id LIMIT 10;
